data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: While the exploratory step indicates that dietary restrictions were noted and all venues were notified, it does not provide concrete evidence of how the system tracks these restrictions across multiple stops. The evidence does not confirm that there is a mechanism in place for tracking dietary restrictions in a way that meets the requirement. Therefore, there is a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of a systematic approach to track dietary restrictions across multiple stops.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
